member.name: T:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions
member.summary: Controls colored console output by .

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Enable
member.summary: Enables any future console color output produced by Pastel.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Disable
member.summary: Disables any future console color output produced by Pastel.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.String,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.String,System.ConsoleColor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.
If , indicates to use the fixed colour that the value represents instead of its theme-defined value configured in the terminal.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ConsoleColor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.
If , indicates to use the fixed colour that the value represents instead of its theme-defined value configured in the terminal.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelConsole(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ConsoleColor)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified console color.
member.param: The string to color.
The console color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelConsoleBg(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ConsoleColor)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified console color.
member.param: The string to color.
The console color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.String@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.Pastel(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.String,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.String,System.ConsoleColor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.
If , indicates to use the fixed colour that the value represents instead of its theme-defined value configured in the terminal.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ConsoleColor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI foreground color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.
The color to use on the specified string.
If , indicates to use the fixed colour that the value represents instead of its theme-defined value configured in the terminal.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.PastelBg(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Returns a string wrapped in an ANSI background color code using the specified color.
member.param: The string to color.

The color to use on the specified string.
Supported format: [#]RRGGBB (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.ScanColorFormatStringInsertPositions(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Locates every escape sequence reset (\x1b[0m) that is neither at the very end of the input nor immediately followed by another reset, i.e. all solitary resets between the start and the end of the input string. The color format string has to be re-inserted at each of these positions, otherwise the remainder of the input would render uncolored.
member.param: The string to scan.
member.returns: The positions at which the color format string has to be re-inserted.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.CountColorFormatStringInsertPositions(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Counts the positions at which the color format string has to be re-inserted, optionally recording them.
member.param: The string to scan.
If not , receives the positions found. Must be able to hold as many positions as a preceding counting pass reported.

member.name: M:Pastel.ConsoleExtensions.ValidateConsoleColor(System.ConsoleColor)
member.summary: Throws if the specified value is not one of the defined members, as all mappers are indexed by its numeric value.
member.param: The console color to validate.

member.name: M:Pastel.EnvironmentDetector.ColorsEnabled
member.summary: Returns if at least one of a predefined set of environment variables are set. These environment variables could e.g. indicate that the application is running in a CI/CD environment.
